pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing setup_task.sh and task_utils.sh which copy the ExampleProject to this hardcoded path.
Verified by checking project.json of the ExampleProject and documents/ARCH.json, which is the document modified in the task description.
Matches the required top-level heading text specified in the task description.

Matches the required text for the child requirement specified in the task description: 'The real-time processing module shall respond to sensor input within 50 milliseconds under nominal operating conditions.'
Matches the task description instruction that the requirement is a direct child of the heading.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the ReqView built-in Example Project (synthetic demo data), which is copied to `/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/add_arch_design_section_project` during setup. The target document to modify is `ARCH.json` (Architecture Design). The required modifications are a top-level heading named 'Performance Constraints', containing a direct child requirement (hierarchy depth 1) whose text must include 'real-time', '50 milliseconds', and 'sensor input'. All task metadata accurately reflects these requirements and the project structure.
